title: VDD static_analysis: run_shell_command executes arbitrary config strings via sh -c
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Security and Access. Location: src/vdd/static_analysis.rs:32-73 (run_shell_command) and src/vdd/mod.rs:688-724 (caller). Violation: VddEngine::run_static_analysis pulls command strings from config.static_analysis.commands or auto-detected guardrails and passes each to sh -c. No allowlist, no escaping audit, no sandboxing. Tampered config.yaml runs arbitrary commands on every VDD pass. No warning banner. Mandated Refactor: Parse command with shlex, execute via argv (no shell). Reject pipes, logical operators, command substitution. Add warning banner listing commands on config load. Consider unshare or seccomp on Linux.
